Why Choose Us

Everything you need to succeed

Industry-leading conditions designed for serious traders

90% Profit Split

Industry-leading profit sharing. Keep more of what you earn with our competitive payout structure.

Fast Evaluation

Complete your evaluation in as little as 7 days. No minimum trading days required.

Zero Risk

Trade with our capital, not yours. Never risk your personal funds while trading.

Any Strategy

Scalp, day trade, or swing trade. Use EAs and algos. No restrictions on your style.

Scaling Plan

Consistent traders can scale up to $2M in capital. Grow with us as you prove yourself.

Bi-Weekly Payouts

Get paid every two weeks. Fast, reliable withdrawals to your preferred method.

Your Path to Funding

How It Works

Three straightforward steps to access professional trading capital. No hidden rules, no surprises — just pure trading.

01

Choose Your Challenge

Select an evaluation account size that matches your trading style. From $10K to $200K — you decide the challenge level.
